Some users are facing minor issues with the kitten-tts-nano-int8 model. We are looking into it. Please report to us if you face any issues.

# Save the audio

sf.write('output.wav', audio, 24000)
Works literally everywhere. Needs python3.12. We recommend using conda.

ResearchFinding(title='Direct Link 3', url='https://huggingface.co/KittenML/kitten-tts-nano-0.8-int8', snippet='Content provided directly by user.', full_content='Kitten TTS Nano 0.8 😻
Kitten TTS is an open-source realistic text-to-speech model with 15 million parameters and around 25MB of filesize.
🚀 Quick Start
Installation
pip install https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS/releases/download/0.8/kittentts-0.8.0-py3-none-any.whl
Basic Usage
from kittentts import KittenTTS
m = KittenTTS("KittenML/kitten-tts-nano-0.8-int8")
audio = m.generate("This high quality TTS model works without a GPU", voice='Jasper' )
# available_voices : ['Bella', 'Jasper', 'Luna', 'Bruno', 'Rosie', 'Hugo', 'Kiki', 'Leo']
# Save the audio
import soundfile as sf
sf.write('output.wav', audio, 24000)
Acknowledgements
StyleTTS 2 architecture
- Downloads last month
- 1,640
Inference Providers NEW
This model isn't deployed by any Inference Provider. 🙋 Ask for provider support', relevance_score=0.8)
key_facts: KittenTTS is an open-source text-to-speech model developed by KittenML (Stellon Labs).
It is extremely lightweight, with the nano version having ~15 million parameters and a file size under 25MB.
The model is CPU-optimized and runs efficiently without a GPU, making it suitable for mobile and edge devices.
It is based on the StyleTS 2 architecture.
Version 0.8 was released in February 2026, offering 14M, 40M, and 80M parameter models.
It offers 8 distinct voices: Bella, Jasper, Luna, Bruno, Rosie, Hugo, Kiki, and Leo.
Installation is handled via a specific pip wheel URL from GitHub releases.
The project is currently in 'developer preview' with a roadmap including a mobile SDK and web version.
structured_summary: KittenTTS is a family of open-source, lightweight text-to-speech models designed for high-quality synthesis with minimal resource usage. The flagship nano model boasts only 15 million parameters (under 25MB size) and is heavily optimized to run on any CPU device in real-time without a GPU. Developed by KittenML, the project aims to provide 'tiny, fun, and powerful' TTS solutions. Version 0.8 introduces larger variants (up to 80M parameters) while maintaining the core accessibility. It supports 8 voices and requires Python 3.12. The tech is currently in preview but demonstrates significant potential for on-device AI applications.
